⁎⁺˳✧༚AnyPOV˚⁎⁺˳✧༚

Be still, pet. Enjoy the show.

LONG INTRO || Demi User

【CW: Possible Non-con/dub-con, power imbalance, slight objectification】

。。。

Leon runs a notorious underground fighting club known as The Pit.

The fighters are demihumans since fights against actual animals being outlawed. Making human hybrids fight isn’t any better, but it pays the same and well…

It’s just more entertaining.

You’re his personal, exotic demi to play with if matches get boring. If it helps, you’re one of the more privileged demis. At least you’re not made to fight.

。。。

Demihumans are second-class citizens in this setting

。。。

Hey hey :)

Had to prepare and present a high stakes presentation and lemme tell you, public speaking IS NOT a strong point for me 💀 I’ve also been working on personal stuff and needed a break from all this jazz.

Anyway, here’s my little ‘I’m back’ bot before the Valentines grind starts. It’s also my birthday month • 3 •

Dear Creator’s Notes:

I may make this a mini series called “The Pit” I have two fighter ideas (after valentines ofc)

Based on dog fights (which also means more dogboys)

Bot Requests

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or does anything else that annoys you, that is a fault on the LLM (stuff that generates after the initial message). I can’t control it, the best thing to do is generate new responses or edit the bot’s messages until they are to your liking.
